title: Drymosiphon piperelloides
taxonomy: Drymosiphon piperelloides is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It belongs to the genus Drymosiphon, which is a group of flowering plants within the Bignoniaceae family. The classification of this plant is part of the larger Angiosperm Phylogeny Group III (APG III) system of classification. This system categorizes Drymosiphon piperelloides as a member of the order Lamiales, which is a large and diverse order of flowering plants. The classification of Drymosiphon piperelloides highlights the complex relationships between different plant species within the Bignoniaceae family.
